```{r}
source("config.R")
```

#Load library 
```{r}
library(dplyr); library(ggplot2); library(pROC)
```

# Load WGCNA workspace
```{r}
load(file.path(INTERMEDIATE, "WGCNA_v5_workspace.RData"))
```

# Build HER2 status vector (0=neg, 1=pos), aligned to ME rows
```{r}
meta_full <- read.delim(file.path(DIR_QC, "DEA_samples_QCmetrics.tsv"))

her2_raw  <- as.character(meta_full$her2[match(rownames(mergedMEs), meta_full$sample_id)])
her2_bin  <- dplyr::case_when(
  her2_raw == "0" ~ "HER2-negative",
  her2_raw == "1" ~ "HER2-positive",
  TRUE            ~ NA_character_)              # 2 (equivocal) and 999 -> NA
her2_bin  <- factor(her2_bin, levels = c("HER2-negative", "HER2-positive"))
```

# 3) Per-module ME vs HER2 — boxplot + Wilcoxon test
```{r}
for (mod in c("darkorange", "violet")) {
  me_col <- paste0("ME", mod)
  df <- data.frame(ME = mergedMEs[[me_col]], HER2 = her2_bin) %>%
        filter(!is.na(HER2))

  w <- wilcox.test(ME ~ HER2, data = df)
  cat(sprintf("\n=== %s ===\n  n HER2-: %d   n HER2+: %d\n  Wilcoxon p = %.3g\n",
              mod, sum(df$HER2 == "HER2-negative"),
              sum(df$HER2 == "HER2-positive"), w$p.value))

  print(
    ggplot(df, aes(HER2, ME, fill = HER2)) +
      geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, outlier.size = 0.8) +
      geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("HER2-negative" = "grey70",
                                   "HER2-positive" = "#C00000")) +
      labs(title = paste0("ME", mod, " vs HER2 status"),
           subtitle = sprintf("Wilcoxon p = %.3g", w$p.value),
           y = paste0("ME", mod), x = NULL) +
      theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = "none"))
```

# 4) ROC / AUC — how well does ME discriminate HER2+ vs HER2
```{r}
  r <- roc(response = df$HER2, predictor = df$ME,
           levels = c("HER2-negative", "HER2-positive"), direction = "<")
  cat(sprintf("  AUC = %.3f (95%% CI %.3f-%.3f)\n",
              auc(r), ci.auc(r)[1], ci.auc(r)[3]))
  plot(r, main = paste0("ROC: ME", mod, " predicts HER2+"))
}
```
